How to improve at literally anything:

1. Pick something 
2. Define it with a number 
3. Write that number down every day for 30 days

Some ideas to try: 

• Reps
• Steps
• Calories
• Pages read
• Screen time
• Words written
• Hours of sleep
• Minutes meditated

Paywall cheat code: The 3-Screen Trial Close

Don't put your trial terms in the fine print. Break it into three separate, less aggressive 'paywall priming' screens:

Screen 1: "We want you to Try this for free"

Screen 2: "We’ll remind you before the trial ends"

Screen 3:

That's 180 wrong orders per month.

180 refund requests. 180 angry customers. 180 potential chargebacks.
